Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
ref: Jour: Bull.Russian Academy of Sciences - Physics, Vol.38, Issue.12, p.113 (1974)
title: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 24 MeV alpha particles by 12C and 13C

x4freetext: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 24 MeV alpha

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Bull.Russian Academy of Sciences - Physics, Vol.38, Issue.12, p.113 (1974)
Jour: Izv. Rossiiskoi Akademii Nauk, Ser.Fiz., Vol.38, p.2591 (1974)
Jour: Bull.Russian Academy of Sciences - Physics, Vol.48, Issue.5, p.158 (1984)

x4freetext: Removable semiconductor detector was used to register
detector placed at an angle of 60 degr. to the beam
axis was used as a monitor.
Self-supporting carbon films with a natural content of
13C (1.1%) and enriched to 72% with the thicknesses of
105 and 256 mg/cm2 were used. The targets were placed
at 45 degr. to the beam axis.
Error of determination of target thickness
Issue numbers in references were added.
Data presentation was corrected. In Sub 001 error
SD: Small corrections in all Subents.
